name: OFD-Net: Teacher-Free Reliable Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation with Orthogonal Feature Disentanglement Net of Foreground-Background

description: arXiv:2607.16705v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) is an effective solution for medical image segmentation with limited annotations. Existing SSL methods mainly rely on pseudo-labels generated by teacher-student supervision or cross-network consistency. However, these methods lack an explicit structural reference for judging pseudo-label quality. Low-quality pseudo...
author: Shao-feng Jiang, Zhe-yang Jing, Qin Lu, Huan-huan Shi, Zhen Chen, Cong-xuan zhang, Chen Yi
